uploadSubtitle: Upload your video directly to your workspace.
leaveUploadWarning: Upload is still in progress. Leaving may interrupt it.
leaveRecordWarning: Recording is still in progress. Leaving may lose your recording.
recordingError: Recording stopped due to an error
leavePageWarning: Recording is still in progress. Your changes may not be saved. Are you sure you want to leave this page?
allowMicAccess: Allow microphone access from browser site permissions to enable it.
allowCameraAccess: Allow camera access from browser site permissions to enable it.
pauseUnsupportedDetail: This browser or recording format does not support pause. Use Stop to finish, or try Chrome with WebM.
prepareNotActive: The recorder did not return to an active state. Try stopping the recording.
youtubeAudioHint: To capture YouTube sound, share a browser tab/window with audio enabled in the share dialog.
subtitle: 1080p screen recording with webcam/mic controls and robust upload.

checklist.title: Pre-record checklist
checklist.browser: Browser: {{browser}}. You can share an entire screen, a window, or a browser tab.
checklist.audioTip: Tip: to capture website audio, share the browser tab and enable audio in the share dialog

processingOverlay.keepTabOpen: Please keep this tab open, operation might take some minutes.

workspaceDialog.title: Workspace required
workspaceDialog.description: Please select a workspace before starting recording. If you do not have one yet, create a workspace first.

shareDialog.title: theRec
shareDialog.description: Choose what to share before starting recording.
shareDialog.systemSoundHint: Enabled by default for tab/system audio capture.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: Manage microphone and camera access for this recording.
permissions.mergeHint: These values are sent to backend so FFmpeg can compose the camera beside the screen.

camera.uploadPartialFail: Screen recording was saved, but camera track completion failed. You can retry camera processing in backend.

noAudioHint: To capture YouTube sound, share a browser tab/window with audio enabled in the share dialog.
browserUnsupported: This browser does not support screen recording.
pleaseCheckPermissions: Please check permissions and try again.
checklistAudio: Audio: microphone + shared screen/tab audio (if provided by browser/OS)

errors.draftMissingId: Unable to create recording draft: missing id in response.
errors.presignedUrlFailed: Could not get presigned URL for upload part.
errors.initCameraUploadFailed: Unable to initialize camera upload session.
errors.noVideoTrack: No video track available in recording stream.

comments.title: Comments
comments.empty: No comments yet. Start the conversation.
comments.deleteDesc: This comment and its replies will be removed.

upload.processingDesc: Your video is now being processed.
upload.cancelDesc: This will stop the current upload, abort multipart upload on the server, and delete this recording draft.
